title: Spicy Fluffy Nostalgic Rice Pilaf
description: A vegetarian-friendly and comforting Norwegian dish featuring a blend of rice wine, spices, and vegetables to create a flavorful and fluffy pilaf that captures the essence of nostalgia.
instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the rice and toast it for about 2 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Stir in bell peppers, onion, garlic, and cook for another 5 minutes until softened.

Add diced tomatoes with their juice, broth, rice wine (if using), cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Transfer the pilaf into an oven-safe dish and bake for 10-15 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
